ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city's geographical coordinates */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city's geographical coordinates */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Primary zip code of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the ranking is recorded */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the ranking */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score of the city */,
  "quality_of_life" REAL /* Quality of life score */,
  "value" REAL /* Value score */,
  "economic_indicators" REAL /* Economic indicators relevant to the city */,
  "demographic_data" REAL /* Demographic data relevant to the city */,
  "environmental_factors" REAL /* Environmental factors that affect the quality of life */,
  "social_factors" REAL /* Social factors that affect the quality of life */,
  "infrastructure_quality" REAL /* Quality of infrastructure in the city */,
  "healthcare_rating" REAL /* Healthcare rating of the city */,
  "education_quality" REAL /* Quality of education in the city */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate of the city */,
  "housing_cost" REAL /* Average housing cost in the city */,
  "transportation_cost" REAL /* Average transportation cost in the city */,
  "entertainment_cost" REAL /* Average entertainment cost in the city */,
  "utility_cost" REAL /* Average utility cost in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the state */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income in the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, real estate agent, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
